title: Trump brings ‘Trump Accounts’ campaign to Georgia high school
shortDescription: President Donald Trump spoke in Georgia to promote the "Trump Accounts" tax-advantaged investment program, outlining the initiative during an event at Wheeler High School.

title: What Is Pickaxe Mountain? Trump's new Iran threat
shortDescription: Trump says the U.S. could hit Iran's Pickaxe Mountain "pretty soon." Here's what we know about the secretive underground facility.

title: Trump mocks Sen. Jon Ossoff, but flubs punchline at Georgia stop
shortDescription: President Donald Trump railed on Democratic Sen. Jon Ossoff during a stop in the midterm battleground of Georgia, but he messed up his big punchline.

title: Some Democrats help GOP pass voter ID bill as others call it a 'trick'
shortDescription: The legislation was attached to a bill to place limits on members of Congress buying and selling stocks while in office.

title: Trump calls Ossoff 'Pinky Herman'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said Georgia Sen. Jon Ossoff reminds him of "Pinky Herman" in an apparent jab at the Democratic senator running for reelection.

title: White House South Lawn razed as Trump's helipad construction underway
shortDescription: The South Lawn is changing under Trump as crews build a Marine One helipad, altering one of the White House’s most iconic spaces.

title: Trump honors return of four fallen US soldiers
shortDescription: President Donald Trump attended the dignified transfer and met with families of four fallen service members at Dover Air Force Base.

title: U.S. Sen. Fetterman criticizes Trump's focus on election fraud claims
shortDescription: U.S. Sen. John Fetterman disputed President Donald Trump's claims about China interfering with the 2020 election.

title: Fetterman joins Senate Dems in push to legalize marijuana. Details
shortDescription: U.S. Sen. John Fetterman, D-Pennsylvania, was among more than a dozen Democrats to reintroduce legislation on legalizing marijuana.

title: Trump joins dignified transfer for troops killed in Iran war
shortDescription: President Trump attended a dignified transfer at Dover for four U.S. service members killed during attacks in the ongoing Iran war.

title: Trump honors return of four US soldiers killed in Iran war
shortDescription: President Trump witnessed the return of four US soldiers killed in the war in Iran as he attended a dignified transfer ceremony in Dover, Delaware.

title: Cruz, Cornyn ask Trump for disaster declaration after Texas floods
shortDescription: Texas senators are asking President Trump for more aid after deadly Hill Country floods damaged nearly 600 homes.

title: Trump on dignified transfer of soldiers
shortDescription: President Donald Trump is set to attend the dignified transfer of soldiers killed in the Iran war.

title: Fetterman criticizes Trump on 2020 election: 'That's been settled'
shortDescription: U.S. Sen. John Fetterman criticized President Donald Trump after Trump's comments about alleged election interference during a primetime address.

title: Watch: Trump is headed to Georgia today, plus the AZ primary results
shortDescription: President Trump's influence prevailed in the Arizona primary. Trump is headed to Georgia today. Plus, Trump is threatening civilian targets in Iran.

title: Trump threatens to escalate retaliatory strikes on Iran, bomb bridges
shortDescription: Donald Trump threatened to bomb Iran's bridges and power plants, in response to attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Trump-backed GOP candidates win in Arizona
shortDescription: Rep. Andy Biggs secured the GOP nomination for governor, setting up a November showdown with Democratic Gov. Katie Hobbs.

title: Trump is coming to Atlanta today. Here's how to watch school visit
shortDescription: President Trump is speaking at Wheeler High School in Marietta today to discuss Trump Accounts. You can watch it live.

title: Arizona election results: Latest on primary races for House, governor
shortDescription: Arizona's November ballot takes shape.

title: Arizona GOP nominates Biggs, other MAGA stalwarts: 5 primary takeaways
shortDescription: Arizona is one of the most competitive battlegrounds where Trump-aligned candidates will be heavily scrutinized.

title: House passes short-term funding bill to avert government shutdown
shortDescription: The vote sends the stopgap, known as a continuing ​resolution, to the ​Senate.

title: Pete Hegseth appears on Capitol Hill amid Iran war funding push
shortDescription: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth told senators the Iran war has cost about $37.5 billion so far as the Pentagon seeks billions more in emergency funding from Congress.
